title: Error: container create failed (no logs from conmon)
body:
### Issue Description

I can't run podman containers, all containers I tried fail with error


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman pull python
2. podman run -it python


### Describe the results you received

```bash
Error: container create failed (no logs from conmon): conmon bytes "": readObjectStart: expect { or n, but found , error found in #0 byte of ...||..., bigger context ...||...
```

### Describe the results you expected

Python prompt

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

```bash
Linux lenovo 6.6.7-arch1-1 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu, 14 Dec 2023 03:45:42 +0000 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

comments.body:
It seems podman fails on this step:
```bash
DEBU[0000] Handling terminal attach                     
INFO[0000] Received shutdown.Stop(), terminating!        PID=142102
```

Running as root yields different error:

```bash
sudo podman run -it --rm python
Error: crun: realpath `3N�Z` failed: No such file or directory: OCI runtime attempted to invoke a command that was not found
```

Same as above, with `--log-level debug`
